functions.name: fuo_bilibili.danmaku2ass.ReadCommentsNiconico
documentation: (timeline, timestamp, no, comment, pos, color, size, height, width)
timeline:  The position when the comment is replayed
timestamp: The UNIX timestamp when the comment is submitted
no:        A sequence of 1, 2, 3, ..., used for sorting
comment:   The content of the comment
height:    The estimated height in pixels
width:     The estimated width in pixels
After implementing ReadComments****, make sure to update ProbeCommentFormat

functions.name: fuo_bilibili.danmaku2ass.GetZoomFactor
documentation: To convert: NewX = f*x+dx, NewY = f*y+dy

functions.name: fuo_bilibili.danmaku2ass.ConvertFlashRotation
documentation: But Flash FOV = width/math.tan(100*math.pi/360.0)/2 will be used instead
Result: (transX, transY, rotX, rotY, rotZ, scaleX, scaleY)

methods.name: fuo_bilibili.provider.BilibiliProvider._get_video_id_pair
documentation:
Some videos/songs has multiple pages, if use_first_page is specified,
the first page will be used. Otherwise, raise MediaNotFound error
(because we do not know which page to return).
